design_philosophy: A one-page interactive market intelligence platform that blends a Bloomberg terminal's precision with a luxury editorial magazine's elegance. Uses smooth parallax, scroll-triggered typographic reveals, and a signature dashed-line motif echoing the Aurrum Intelligence logo.

fonts.heading: Playfair Display, Bodoni Moda, serif
fonts.mono: IBM Plex Mono, JetBrains Mono, monospace

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none

rules.pairing: Use serif for prominent narrative headlines. Use condensed geometric sans for UI elements and subtitles. Use monospace for market tickers and data points.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grids with asymmetry for services. Sticky-scroll 50/50 layouts for 'How it Works'.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid borders using the signature dashed line motif for section dividers and card borders.

motion_and_interaction.parallax: Subtle parallax on images and background noise/particles.
motion_and_interaction.reveal: Scroll-triggered letter-by-letter or masked word reveals for H1 and H2 using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.cursor: Custom cursor following orb that inverses color or expands on hover over links.
motion_and_interaction.magnetic: Magnetic effect on primary CTA buttons (using Framer Motion spring).
motion_and_interaction.background: Subtle canvas particle/network background in ivory/blue tones that reacts slightly to mouse.

navbar.style: Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#f7f3e8]/80 or solid ivory background. Sticky to top with mix-blend mode if traversing dark sections.

buttons.primary: Solid deep royal blue (#013aa9) background, ivory text, rounded-none or very slight radius. Magnetic hover.
buttons.secondary: Outline button with dashed royal blue border, solid on hover.

cards.style: Flat, 1px dashed or solid border (rgba(1, 58, 169, 0.2)), no drop shadows. Editorial precision.

market_ticker.style: Endless marquee (react-fast-marquee) using monospace font. Deep blue background with ivory text, or vice-versa.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.description: Animated intro revealing logo and tagline 'Read the market. Trade the edge.' Features magnetic CTA, floating market ticker element, and subtle network background.

sections.name: About/Mission
sections.description: Editorial layout with high-contrast typography. Scroll-reveal text explaining the institutional-level edge Aurrum provides.

sections.name: Services/Capabilities
sections.description: Bento grid layout. Daily Briefing, Macro Intelligence, Sector Deep-Dives, Trade Ideas, Risk Radar. Hover states use dashed-line animations.

sections.name: How it Works
sections.description: 3-4 step process using sticky-scroll animation. Content on one side stays sticky while the other scrolls.

sections.name: Sample Briefing
sections.description: Mock briefing card with animated chart lines mimicking the logo's dashed motif. Live-market feel.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.description: Minimal. One bold accessible price. High contrast.

sections.name: Team
sections.description: Professional portraits with subtle monochrome or high-contrast filter on hover.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.description: Deep blue inverted section. Form with name, email, message, trading style. Animated submit. Form state should be saved to DB only.

logos.description: Aurrum Intelligence official logo. Must be used in Navbar and Hero.

images.description: Stock market data chart showing trends.
Professional business portrait of a man.
Professional business portrait of a woman.
Professional business portrait of a woman in black.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette: Ivory (#f7f3e8) and Deep Royal Blue (#013aa9). Do not invert to dark mode. Only the contact section or specific blocks should be deep blue to act as contrast breaks.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveals, magnetic buttons, and the cursor orb.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling. This is critical for the luxury feel.
Implement react-fast-marquee for the market tickers.
Ensure the dashed line chart motif (from the logo) is prevalent in dividers, background elements, and hover effects. Use SVG strokes with strokeDasharray and Framer Motion to animate these.
Make the background slightly noisy or use a subtle ivory particle network.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
